# Distribution / Host Integration SSOT: Store Channel Policy

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/distributionhostdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to distribution-host-integration.md](../distribution-host-integration.md)

Store channel policy is the C11/C7 boundary where distribution channel facts are reduced into allowed, forbidden, or review-gated host surfaces.

## Generated Detail Surfaces

- [Store channel policy table](store-channel-policy/policy-table.md)
- [Server-facing metadata](store-channel-policy/server-facing-metadata.md)
- [Review / demo mode](store-channel-policy/review-demo-mode.md)
- [Open questions](store-channel-policy/open-questions.md)
- [Version-affecting changes](store-channel-policy/versioning.md)

## Executable Owners

- `tools/storecontract` generates the policy table from `internal/policy.EvaluateStoreChannelPolicy` and `packaging/store/riido_daemon_store_distribution.riido.json`.
- `tools/privacymetadata` generates server-facing metadata boundaries from the privacy metadata allowlist.
- `tools/distributionhostdocs` generates this index plus review/demo, open question, and versioning reader docs.
